name: Annual Leave
description: Paid time off for vacation or personal reasons

name: Sick Leave
description: Leave granted for illness or medical emergencies

name: Casual Leave
description: Short-term leave for personal or unforeseen matters

name: Maternity Leave
description: Leave granted to female employees during pregnancy and childbirth

name: Paternity Leave
description: Leave granted to male employees for childbirth and childcare

name: Bereavement Leave
description: Leave granted in the event of a family member's death

name: Unpaid Leave
description: Leave taken without salary deduction waiver

name: Study Leave
description: Leave granted for educational or training purposes

name: Compensatory Leave
description: Leave granted in lieu of extra work hours or holidays worked

name: Marriage Leave
description: Leave provided for an employee’s wedding ceremony
